text: Entering this space, I am struck by a sense of curiosity. The glass walls and modern design evoke an atmosphere of anticipation. Each reflection and line invites self-awareness, asking me to contemplate the boundaries between what is seen and what is perceived. The transition to the brightly colored wall, boldly marked 'R+D,' deepens this feeling; I feel engaged by the merging of human creativity and technological innovation. There is excitement in the air, and a faint restlessness as I ponder how humans and machines might learn from one another. I feel like both observer and participant, quietly exhilarated by the questions that linger here.
